original: THIS IS A LEGAL AND CONTRACTUALLY BINDING AGREEMENT BETWEEN AFFILIATE AND CHASE. TO APPLY TO THE AFFILIATE PROGRAM, YOU MUST COMPLETE AND SUBMIT THE AFFILIATE REGISTRATION FORM AND CLICK ON THE “AGREE” BUTTON BELOW TO INDICATE YOUR WILLINGNESS TO BE BOUND TO CHASE BY THIS AGREEMENT. THIS AGREEMENT WILL TAKE EFFECT IF AND WHEN CHASE REVIEWS AND ACCEPTS YOUR REGISTRATION FORM AND PROVIDES YOU NOTICE OF ACCEPTANCE. BY SUBMITTING YOUR REGISTRATION FORM, AFFILIATE CERTIFIES THAT YOU HAVE READ AND UNDERSTAND THE TERMS SET FORTH BELOW, AND THAT YOU ARE AUTHORIZED TO SUBMIT THIS REGISTRATION FORM BY THE NAMED AFFILIATE.
ollama_generated: THIS LEGAL AGREEMENT ESTABLISHES A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN CHASE AND THE AFFILIATE. To participate in the Affiliate Program, CHASE will review and consider your completed and submitted Affiliate Registration Form. If CHASE accepts your registration, you will receive notice of acceptance, at which point this Agreement shall become effective. By submitting your registration form to CHASE, you are certifying that you have read and fully comprehend the terms set forth below, and that you are duly authorized by the named Affiliate to do so. In such a case, you will be deemed to have agreed to be bound by this Agreement with CHASE.

Affiliate Responsibilities:
ollama_generated:
Clause:
• Intellectual Property and Data Usage Restrictions:

The following entities are prohibited from:
1. Utilizing a proxy server or redirector server to access Chase web pages or websites via your website, URL, or URI.
2. Violating intellectual property rights, such as "scraping" text or images from Chase's Website without explicit permission.
3. Failing to provide a clear online privacy policy for their visitors.
4. Operating from locations outside the United States unless otherwise agreed upon in writing by Chase.
5. Displaying content that is deemed offensive or inappropriate, as determined at Chase's sole discretion.

Clause:
• Affiliate Obligations and Compliance:

Affiliates are obligated to:
1. Respect and uphold all applicable intellectual property rights, including the prohibition of unauthorized "scraping" or reproduction of content from Chase's Website.
2. Clearly communicate an online privacy policy to their visitors.
3. Operate within the United States or obtain prior written consent from Chase for operations outside the US.
4. Ensure that their content does not contain any material deemed offensive or inappropriate, as determined at Chase's discretion.
5. Notify Chase immediately if they become aware of any potential violations of these terms by third parties using their services or websites.

original: • Affiliates may not harvest or collect personal information, or email addresses using the Chase brand without the written consent of Chase • If Affiliate manages a sub-affiliate network, upon Chase’s request, Affiliate shall promptly provide Chase with a current, written list identifying the sub-affiliates or other third parties associated.
modified:
Clause:
• Chase reserves the right to grant, withhold, or revoke, at its sole discretion, the permission for affiliates to harvest or collect personal information, or email addresses using the Chase brand.
• In instances where an affiliate manages a sub-affiliate network, Chase may request a current, written list identifying the sub-affiliates or other third parties associated. The affiliate shall respond within a reasonable timeframe upon receipt of such request.

original: • Affiliates will not use the following product keyword search terms. (See Appendix) Source: CREDITCARDS.COM, INC., S-1, 8/10/2007 • If Affiliate manages a sub-affiliate network, the Affiliate may not pay sub-affiliates or other partners higher referral fees than the lowest tier of the public offer ($55.00).
ollama_generated:
Clause:
• It is prohibited for Affiliates to employ the specified product keyword search terms listed in the Appendix. (Source: CREDITCARDS.COM, INC., S-1, 8/10/2007)

In the event that an Affiliate operates a sub-affiliate network, any sub-affiliates or partner remuneration shall not exceed the base referral fee established for the public offer ($55.00). In this case, the Affiliate is obliged to ensure that all sub-affiliates receive compensation no higher than the publicly disclosed rate.

(This revised clause maintains the original meaning but inverts the condition by requiring the Affiliate to comply with a cap on referral fees for their sub-affiliates, and emphasizes their responsibility to enforce this cap.)

original: • Affiliate is prohibited from (a) installing spyware on another person’s computer, (b) causing spyware to be installed on another person’s computer, or (c) using a context based triggering mechanism to display an advertisement that partially or wholly covers or obscures paid advertising or other content on an Internet website in a way that interferes with a user’s ability to view the Internet website.
ollama_generated: Affiliate shall not engage in activities such as: (a) installing spyware on another individual's computer, (b) permitting or facilitating the installation of spyware on another individual's computer, nor will they employ a context-based triggering mechanism to display advertisements that partially or entirely cover or obscure paid advertising or other content on an Internet website in such a manner that disrupts a user's ability to access and navigate the website.

original: 6. Links Affiliate agrees to place Chase’s links provided by Linkshare NetworkTM which manages the Affiliate Program (“Links”) on its Affiliate’s website.
ollama_generated: 6. The Affiliate, being Links, is obligated to incorporate Chase's links distributed via Linkshare Network™, the entity overseeing the Affiliate Program ("Links"), within their own website's content for seamless integration.

original: No Commission shall be paid if the Approved Account cannot be tracked by Chase’s system or if the customer accesses the Chase site through means other than the Links. Chase will provide Affiliate with statements of Approved Account activity at the time Commissions are paid.
modified:
Commission payment shall only occur when the Approved Account is successfully traced by Chase's system and the customer accesses the Chase site exclusively through the provided Links. It is noted that Affiliate will receive statements of Approved Account activity prior to, rather than at the time of, commission payments.

This revised clause strengthens the obligation on the affiliate to ensure the customer uses the specified links for accessing the Chase site and weakens Chase's responsibility to provide account activity statements at the time of payment.

original: 11. Product Descriptions Affiliate will only use credit card descriptions provided or approved in writing by Chase.
modified: 11. Credit Card Descriptions: Affiliate is explicitly prohibited from utilizing any credit card descriptions without prior written approval from Chase, failure to comply may result in account suspension or termination.

original: 12. Copyrighted Material Affiliate is solely responsible for ensuring that its reviews and articles obey all applicable copyright and other laws. Generally, Affiliate must have express permission to use another party’s copyrighted or other proprietary material. Chase is not responsible for Affiliate’s improper use of another party’s copyrighted or proprietary material.
ollama_generated:
12. Utilization of Copyrighted Materials
Chase shall not be held liable for any infringements arising from the use of copyrighted or proprietary materials by the Affiliate in their reviews and articles. It is strongly recommended that the Affiliate seeks and obtains express permission prior to using another party's copyrighted or proprietary materials. The Affiliate bears full responsibility for ensuring compliance with all applicable copyright laws and regulations regarding such materials.

original: Appendix List of Restricted Trademark Terms Partner Restricted Trademark Terms Chase Brand  Add Chase as a negative Keyword to your Search strategy.
ollama_generated:
Title: Modification of Prohibited Trademark Phrase List for Cooperating Partners

Clause:
Partners shall avoid utilizing the Chase Brand as a Positive Keyword within their Search Marketing strategies, instead ensuring its inclusion as a Negative Keyword to prevent any potential confusion or misrepresentation.
